name: @gutomec/ai-public-arsenal
description: Open-source skills, squads, and agents for AI coding assistants — installable via skills.sh. Squad Manager v3 with doom loop detection, Ralph loop retry, real validation, filesystem collaboration, execution traces, reasoning sandwich model routing, DAG workflows, self-verify steps, and dual-path discovery (./squads + ~/squads).
author: Luiz Gustavo Vieira Rodrigues <gutomec@yahoo.com.br> (https://github.com/gutomec)

scripts.version: git add -A && git commit -m 'chore: bump version to %s'

metadata.note: This package always installs from GitHub. npm is a registry redirector only. GitHub is the single source of truth for all updates.
